violations.text: Cod fish was observed thawing in its original intact reduced oxygen packaging (ROP). Seafood items within ROP packaging shall be completely removed from their original packaging prior to thawing to allow the reintroduction of oxygen into the food item. Food items were observed still frozen and were completely removed from their original packaging during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026
The condensate from the walk-in cooler is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2025

The door to the basement toilet room is not self-closing. Toilet room doors that open to food preparation spaces shall be self-closing to prevent/limit potential contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026

Cooked chicken, rice, and cut vegetables were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025
The condensate from the walk-in cooler is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2025

The door to the outside, located in the lower prep area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2023
Establishment does not have a drainboard at the 3 bay sink. -A drainboard shall be installed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023
-Establishment is lacking a food prep sink. A food prep sink shall be installed with an air gap. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023
